overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit Asian-inspired urban district. The scene features digital cherry blossom trees with glowing pink petals, traditional architecture mixed with futuristic elements, and heavy use of teal and magenta neon lighting reflecting off wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with digital cherry blossom trees and modern neon buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit plaza toward a traditional Asian structure in the distance

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at food stall with red umbrella

entered.detail: large tree with glowing pink digital petals and illuminated branches
modern building with bright teal neon edge lighting along the roofline
large digital billboard displaying animated advertisements
rain-slicked ground reflecting neon lights in pink and teal hues

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide cyberpunk plaza at night, dominated by a large digital cherry blossom tree with glowing pink petals. The camera moves forward past a modern building with teal neon trim, approaching a traditional Asian pavilion structure in the distance. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lighting, and a few NPCs are scattered throughout the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Asian walkway with red paper lanterns and stone monuments

events.description: enters the traditional Asian pavilion area with hanging red lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered walkway beneath red lanterns, passing stone monuments

notable_agents.action: person in white pants walking away from camera toward the pavilion

entered.detail: wooden structure with curved roof tiles and columns, decorated with red lanterns
series of illuminated red spherical lanterns hanging from the pavilion roof
traditional stone monument with candles and offerings at its base
street food vendor cart with red umbrella and warm lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a traditional Asian pavilion walkway adorned with hanging red paper lanterns. The architecture shifts from modern to traditional with wooden columns and curved roofs. A stone lantern shrine with burning candles appears on the right, while the digital cherry blossom tree recedes into the left background. The space feels more enclosed and sheltered compared to the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated ramp and overlook with view of lower street

events.description: begins ascending ramp to upper walkway level
reaches overlook point with view of lower street filled with red lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking up a concrete ramp to an elevated walkway, then looking down at the street below before descending

entered.detail: concrete and metal ramp structure with railings leading upward
exposed metal support beams and framework of the overhead structure
view down to the street level below with clusters of red lighting
dense collection of red lanterns visible below on the lower street

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a ramp to an elevated walkway, leaving the traditional pavilion behind. From the overlook, the view opens to a lower street filled with clusters of red lanterns. The environment becomes more industrial with exposed steel beams and concrete structures. The segment ends as the camera begins descending back to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian street with purple neon lighting and commercial signage

events.description: descends back to street level entering covered walkway with purple neon floor
camera pans upward to look at building facade and overhead structures

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered commercial area, observing neon signs and looking up at the architecture

notable_agents.action: person in red outfit walking across the purple-lit floor

entered.detail: columned walkway with overhead cover and concrete pillars
illuminated floor sections glowing with purple and magenta light
large cursive neon sign reading 'Bliss' in warm white and orange
neon sign reading 'JIG-JIG STREET' in pink and green letters
red and white striped barriers blocking off sections of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment returns to street level in a covered commercial walkway featuring purple neon floor panels. The camera passes the prominent 'Bliss' neon sign and approaches the 'JIG-JIG STREET' intersection. The digital cherry blossom tree reappears on the left, and the camera pans upward to examine the building facades and overhead structures before the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban district that transitions from an open digital garden into a sheltered traditional pavilion and finally into a dense commercial corridor. It begins in a wide plaza dominated by a glowing pink digital cherry blossom tree, moving past teal-trimmed modern buildings across wet, reflective pavement toward a distant pavilion. As the camera enters the pavilion, the environment shifts from open space to an enclosed walkway of wooden columns and red paper lanterns, passing a stone shrine with burning candles. The scene then ascends a ramp to an elevated industrial overlook of steel beams and concrete before descending back to street level. Finally, the camera glides through a covered commercial walkway with purple neon floor panels, passing the Bliss sign toward the Jig-Jig Street intersection as it pans upward to reveal the towering building facades.
